---
title: "compbio_webpage2.0_2026"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.


Homework 1: [Homework 1](homework1.html)

Homework 3: [Homework 3](homework3.html)

Homework 4: [Homework 4](homework4.html)

Homework 5: [Homework 5](homework5.html)

Homework 6: [Homework 6](homework6.html)

Homework 7: [Homework 7](homework7.html)

Homework 8: [Homework 8](homework8.html)

Homework 9: [Homework 9](homework9.html)

Homewor 11: [Homework 11](https://kite797.github.io/CA_SIR_6100/)
